title: mentha longifolia subsp. hymalaiensis
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. hymalaiensis, also known as Himalayan pennyroyal, is a subspecies of mint native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. hymalaiensis include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support various health conditions.
